title: Ubiquiti U-Rack-6U-TL, Toolless mini rack, 6U
category: Ubiquiti / Cabinets / 19" Data cabinets / Open frames
description: Miniature rack mounting frame on wheels with size 6U , depth 460 mm and special type of screwless mounting individual of active and passive elements is compatible with most Ubiquiti devices. The advantages of the datacabinet are lockable wheels, delivery with one 24-port empty patch panel and a load capacity of 35 kg.
